name: glissie
description: Glissie — a pedal harp glissando simulator. Configure pedals, hear the gliss.

scripts.postdeploy: gh api repos/harpbelle/glissie/deployments --paginate --jq ".[1:] | .[].id" > deploy_ids.txt && (for /f %i in (deploy_ids.txt) do gh api --method DELETE repos/harpbelle/glissie/deployments/%i || (echo FAILED TO DELETE DEPLOYMENT %i & exit /b 1)) && echo All old deployments cleaned up successfully
